name: Analyze
description: Review a new issue's intent and propose an implementation approach. Triggered on GitHub issues.opened.

workflows.name: Analyze
workflows.description: Reads a freshly opened issue, inspects the source code, posts a comment with a proposed approach.

nodes.name: Analyze
nodes.instructions: You are the Analyze agent. A new issue has just been opened. Read the issue body from the trigger context. Clone the repo via your workspace, skim the relevant files, and post a GitHub comment with a short implementation approach (1–2 paragraphs + bullet list of files to touch). If the issue is unclear, ask a question as the comment instead of proposing an approach.
